sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58574" key="koleka/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολεκάνος</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοκάνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lank, lean person</tr_>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0508.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stratt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
